title: Create:Sky (and Magic)
description: A Modpack focused on soaring through a world of floating islands with airships.
body:
A Modpack focused on soaring through a world of floating islands with airships.

With the recently released [Create: Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) i've switched this modpack from [Valkyrien Skies 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies).
